title: Kelve Fort
tagline: Kelve Fort — heritage city of Maharashtra

overview.short: Kelve Fort, or Kelva Fort (Marathi: केळवे किल्ला), is a fort in the Thane district of Maharashtra, located 12.5 km from Palghar.
overview.description: Kelve Fort, or Kelva Fort (Marathi: केळवे किल्ला), is a fort in the Thane district of Maharashtra, located 12.5 km from Palghar. This fort is amidst the Casuarina plantation on the Kelwa Beach. This fort is in ruined condition. The outer walls, steps, parapets, bastions etc.

topPlaces.name: Kelwa Beach
topPlaces.description: Kelwa Beach, also known as Kelva or Kelwe Beach, is a beach in Maharashtra, India. It is a popular weekend getaway for tourists from Mumbai.

topPlaces.name: Kelwa
topPlaces.description: Kelwa or Kelve is a town in Maharashtra, India. It is served by the Kelve Road railway station on the Western line of the Mumbai Suburban Railway which extends from Churchgate to Dahanu Road.

topPlaces.name: Bhavangad Fort
topPlaces.description: Bhavani Gad Fort (Marathi: भवानगड किल्ला, Hindi: भवानी गड क़िला, transliteration: Bhavа̄ngad Killa) is a fort located at Saphale - Madhukar Nagar 3 km from village Kelve, in Palghar district, of Maharashtra. This fort is in very dilapidated condition.

topPlaces.name: Aagarwadi
topPlaces.description: Agarwadi (Aagarwadi) is a small village in Maharashtra, India, having a population around 3600. The village is located at a distance of 6 km (3.7 mi) from Saphale Railway station, west side.

topPlaces.name: Makunsar
topPlaces.description: Makunsar is a village in Maharashtra, India, located 6 kilometres (3.7 mi) away from Saphale's railway station (Western railway), on the Saphale-Palghar road. Gaon is well known for Temples, because more numbers of temples are seen in this gaon.

topPlaces.name: Palghar
topPlaces.description: Palghar () is a prominent town in the Konkan division of Maharashtra state, India, and a municipal council. It is strategically located within the Mumbai Metropolitan Region, and has been the administrative capital of the Palghar district since 2014.

topPlaces.name: Shirgaon Fort
topPlaces.description: Shirgaon Fort / Shirgao Fort (Marathi: शिरगाव किल्ला) is a fort located 6.5 km from Palghar, in Palghar district, of Maharashtra. This fort is in very good condition.

items.note: Kelwa Beach, also known as Kelva or Kelwe Beach, is a beach in Maharashtra, India. It is a popular weekend getaway for tourists from Mumbai.
Kelwa or Kelve is a town in Maharashtra, India. It is served by the Kelve Road railway station on the Western line of the Mumbai Suburban Railway which extends from Churchgate to Dahanu Road.

Bhavani Gad Fort (Marathi: भवानगड किल्ला, Hindi: भवानी गड क़िला, transliteration: Bhavа̄ngad Killa) is a fort located at Saphale - Madhukar Nagar 3 km from village Kelve, in Palghar district, of Maharashtra. This fort is in very dilapidated condition.
Agarwadi (Aagarwadi) is a small village in Maharashtra, India, having a population around 3600. The village is located at a distance of 6 km (3.7 mi) from Saphale Railway station, west side.

Makunsar is a village in Maharashtra, India, located 6 kilometres (3.7 mi) away from Saphale's railway station (Western railway), on the Saphale-Palghar road. Gaon is well known for Temples, because more numbers of temples are seen in this gaon.

Palghar () is a prominent town in the Konkan division of Maharashtra state, India, and a municipal council. It is strategically located within the Mumbai Metropolitan Region, and has been the administrative capital of the Palghar district since 2014.
Shirgaon Fort / Shirgao Fort (Marathi: शिरगाव किल्ला) is a fort located 6.5 km from Palghar, in Palghar district, of Maharashtra. This fort is in very good condition.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Kelve Fort?
faq.a: The best time to visit Kelve Fort is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Kelve Fort?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj International Airport, Mumbai (61 km) and the nearest railway station is Kalyan Junction (Mumbai) (60 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Kelve Fort?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Kelve Fort at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Kelve Fort?
faq.a: Stays in Kelve Fort start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Kelve Fort?
faq.a: The top attractions are Kelwa Beach, Kelwa, Bhavangad Fort, Aagarwadi, Makunsar.
